title: glycosmis chlorosperma
intro: Glycosmis chlorosperma, also known as the Australian greenheart, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Glycosmis chlorosperma include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the oil extracted from the leaves to create a topical treatment.
